name: Integrated
description: Built-in systems that are permanently attached to the vehicle frame.

name: Actuator
description: Slots for responsive actuator-driven weapons and sensors requiring fast targeting.

name: Main
description: Primary hardpoints for standard weapon and sensor installations.

name: Flex
description: Versatile slots that can be reconfigured between different equipment types.

name: Accessory
description: Minor slots for supplementary gear, sensors, and support systems.

name: Heavy
description: Reinforced mounts designed for large weapons and heavy equipment.

name: Engine
description: Power plant slots for primary and auxiliary propulsion systems.
